loop1.title: All Runs (Fuel Log)
loop1.note: Showing total energy (kWh) and load factor as proxies for fuel consumption and run hours, as the meter does not log fuel volume or run-state counters. Faults and starts are also proxied by load activity.

loop1.title: Fuel & Tank — Composite
loop1.note: Showing active power and energy history — fuel level, burn rate, and temperature are not measured by this meter; using power/energy as same-quantity-family proxies for the trend visualization.
